phrases.cultural_note: Spaccanapoli is the long straight street that literally 'splits Naples' — following the ancient Greek grid of the city.

responses.english: This street here is Spaccanapoli, we're on it.
responses.phonetic: KWES-tah VEE-ah kwee eh spak-kah-NAH-poh-lee, chee SYAH-moh.
responses.french: Questa via qui è Spaccanapoli, ci siamo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat the best pizza in Naples
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia la migliore pizza di Napoli?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see MAN-jah lah meel-YOH-reh PEET-tsah dee NAH-poh-lee?
phrases.cultural_note: Neapolitan pizza is protected by EU law — the original pizzerie include L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele and Sorbillo.

responses.english: At Michele's or Sorbillo's, they're the historic greats.
responses.phonetic: dah mee-KEH-leh oh dah sor-BEEL-loh, SOH-noh ee meel-YOH-ree STOH-ree-chee.
responses.french: Da Michele o da Sorbillo, sono i migliori storici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the underground Naples tour starts
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si fa il tour di Napoli Sotterranea?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see fah eel tour dee NAH-poh-lee sot-teh-RAH-neh-ah?

responses.english: At Piazza San Gaetano, number twenty.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah san gah-eh-TAH-noh, noo-MEH-roh VEN-tee.
responses.french: In Piazza San Gaetano, numero venti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Christmas alley (Via San Gregorio Armeno) is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è Via San Gregorio Armeno?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH VEE-ah san greh-GOH-ryoh ar-MEH-noh?
phrases.cultural_note: Via San Gregorio Armeno is Naples' street of nativity crib makers — open year-round but busiest at Christmas.

responses.english: Turn left, then second on the right.
responses.phonetic: JEE-ree ah see-NEES-trah, poi lah seh-KON-dah ah DES-trah.
responses.french: Giri a sinistra, poi la seconda a destra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the historic center is a UNESCO site
phrases.text_local: Scusi, il centro storico di Napoli è Patrimonio UNESCO?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eel CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh dee NAH-poh-lee eh pah-tree-MOH-nyoh OO-neh-skoh?

responses.english: Yes, since 1995 it's on the World Heritage List.
responses.phonetic: see, dal meel-leh-noh-VEH-chen-toh-noh-VAN-tah-CHEEN-kweh eh NEL-lah LEES-tah del pah-tree-MOH-nyoh mon-dee-AH-leh.
responses.french: Sì, dal 1995 è nella lista del Patrimonio Mondiale.
